strategy_reasoning: Translating backend maintenance and API updates into a cozy garden metaphor. Visualizing new models as creative tools, identity sync as gardening/organization, and spam mitigation as literal bug-eating keeps technical updates digestible and emotionally warm.
visual_style: Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Lo-fi retro vibes with soft pastel gradients, warm ambient lighting, and chunky sprites. Lime green (#ecf874) used prominently as a brand anchor. Reminiscent of Stardew Valley or A Short Hike.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She is wearing tiny headphones, hovering next to a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot has square pixel eyes and happily holds a glowing picture frame. They are in a cozy digital studio with a retro synth. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients. Text in pixel font: 'V5'.
images.description: Polly and the Robot discovering the new Suno v5 and Flux 2 Dev models.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She is wearing tiny librarian glasses, carefully watering a digital garden where code-plants and glowing blank name tags sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel mint and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like A Short Hike. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic. Text in pixel font: 'SYNC'.
images.description: Polly independently managing the GitHub identity sync and pruning the user garden.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a round tan mochi-ball creature with tiny dot eyes and wide happy mouth happily eating glitchy red spam code blocks. Speech bubble: 'NOMNOM' in pixel font. A cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings watches amused, wearing a tiny sheriff's hat. Lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream soft gradient background. Large visible pixels, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, warm lighting, cozy vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic.
images.description: Nomnom creature eating spam, representing the new automated abuse detection cron job.

caption:
shipped a few things this week to keep the garden growing. added Suno v5, Flux 2 Dev, and Step 3.5 Flash to the API, so your audio and image generation just got a nice bump in quality.

also spent some time on maintenance: the system now automatically cleans up deleted GitHub accounts and syncs name changes. plus, we wired up an automated cron job to eat spam before it hits the ecosystem. the infrastructure heals itself a little better today. 

all live on the api. 🐝
alt_text: A carousel of three cozy 8-bit pixel art images. First: A cute bee mascot with headphones and a monitor-headed robot holding a picture frame. Second: The bee wearing librarian glasses watering glowing name tags in lime green pots. Third: A round mochi creature eating glitchy code blocks while the bee watches in a tiny sheriff hat.
